description_long: This is a suburban detached house with a mix of brick and light-colored siding on its exterior walls, featuring a prominent gable roof covered in dark shingles. The property includes a paved driveway leading to an attached garage, a fenced backyard with a small play structure, and landscaped elements such as trees and shrubs. The front yard is open with a walkway leading to the main entrance, which is accented by a small porch and decorative columns. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with a combination of standard and larger picture windows providing natural light. The backyard is enclosed by a white fence, offering privacy and a safe play area. The house sits adjacent to a street, with a sidewalk and curb visible at the front.
description: A two-story suburban house with a gable roof, brick and siding exterior, attached garage, fenced backyard, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, garage, and landscaped front yard with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick facade, side windows, and the transition from the front yard to the backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, play structure, and the back of the house with additional windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side of the house, backyard fence, and landscaping elements.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with a mix of standard and large windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a small porch, decorative columns, steps, and a single front door
